pr.title: [Non-Record] JEPA Self-Distillation with EMA Target Encoder for Autoregressive LM (val_bpb: 1.19) | Current Noisy/Negative Result

output.summary: JEPA self-distillation on a causal LM via EMA target encoder plus predictor MLP with VICReg-stabilized loss, keeping only the context encoder for inference.
techniques: JEPA auxiliary loss with EMA target encoder
Predictor MLP forecasts next-token latent representation
VICReg applied to target representations to prevent collapse
